description: Unit test file for the scoring engine, specifically testing the 3/2 validation logic and report generation for user skills against role requirements.

methods.name: validateThreeTwoBalance
methods.description: Validates whether user skills meet the 3 mastery and 2 growth areas criteria for a specific role.

methods.name: buildThreeTwoReport
methods.description: Builds a detailed report of user skills validation, including status, mastery and growth areas, and score.
